# Why People Stopped Showing Up

**Source:** `content/courses/course_01_civic_awakening/chapter_01/segments/06_segment.md`  
**Generated by:** `template`  
**Tags:** disengagement, trust, fatigue

## HOOK
# Why People Stopped Showing Up ## Book Narrative People do not usually withdraw from civic life because they stop caring.

## REALITY
They withdraw because they become tired, frustrated, confused, or unconvinced that participation matters. Some have attended meetings and felt ignored.
